nodes.excerpt:
1. нҸ¬мҠӨнҠём—җ нғңк·ё м¶”к°Җн•ҳкё° нғңк·ёлҘј л„Јкі мһҗ н•ҳлҠ” нҸ¬мҠӨнҠёмқҳ index.md н—ӨлҚ”м—җ tagsлқјлҠ” л©”нғҖ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј м¶”к°Җн•ңлӢӨ.
 2. GraphQL мҝјлҰ¬ мҲҳм • мқҳ н•ҳлӢЁм—җ мң„м№ҳн•ң GraphQL мҝјлҰ¬м—җ лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмқҙ tagsлҘј м¶”к°Җн•ҙмӨҖлӢӨ. 3. kebabcaseвҖҰ

1. ScrollView UI мғқм„ұ л°Ҹ м„Өм • Hirearchy м°Ҫм—җм„ң л§Ҳмҡ°мҠӨ мҡ°нҒҙлҰӯ>UI>Scroll ViewлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•ҳм—¬ м»ҙнҸ¬л„ҢнҠёлҘј мғқм„ұн•ңлӢӨ. мҲҳм§Ғл°©н–ҘмңјлЎңл§Ң мҠӨнҒ¬лЎӨн•  кІғмқҙлҜҖлЎң мҲҳнҸү scroll barлҠ” мӮӯм ңн•ҳкі , Scroll Viewмқҳ ScrollвҖҰ

[лӘ©м°Ё] List(лҰ¬мҠӨнҠё) м„ м–ё, мӣҗмҶҢ м¶”к°Җ, мӣҗмҶҢ нғҗмғү, мӣҗмҶҢ м ңкұ°, м •л ¬ Dictionary(л”•м…”л„ҲлҰ¬) м„ м–ё, мӣҗмҶҢ м¶”к°Җ, мӣҗмҶҢ к°’ м ‘к·ј, нӮӨ нҸ¬н•Ё м—¬л¶Җ, мҶҚм„ұ, ліөмӮ¬, м •л ¬ ListвҖҰ

Random Class : UnityEngineм—җ лӮҙмһҘлҗң нҒҙлһҳмҠӨ лһңлҚӨ мҲ«мһҗ м¶”м¶ң  : 0.0м—җм„ң 1.0 мӮ¬мқҙмқҳ мһ„мқҳмқҳ л¶ҖлҸҷ мҶҢмҲҳм җ мҲҳлҘј м ңкіө  : мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ м ңкіөн•ң мөңмҶҹк°’кіј мөңлҢ“к°’ мӮ¬мқҙмқҳ мһ„мқҳмқҳ мҲ«мһҗлҘј м ңкіө.
м ңкіөлҗң мөңмҶҹк°’&мөңлҢ“к°’мқҙ intвҶ’intвҖҰ

Transaction(нҠёлһңмһӯм…ҳ) нҠёлһңмһӯм…ҳмқҳ нҠ№м„ұ ACID Atomic : нҠёлһңмһӯм…ҳм—җ нҸ¬н•Ёлҗң SQLл¬ёл“ӨмқҖ лӘЁл‘җ мӢӨн–үлҗҳкұ°лӮҳ н•ҳлӮҳлҸ„ мӢӨн–үлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ мғҒнғңм—¬м•ј н•ңлӢӨ. Consistent(мқјкҙҖм„ұ) : SQlвҖҰ

Partition(нҢҢнӢ°м…ҳ) н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ н…Ңмқҙлё”мқ„ 2к°ң мқҙмғҒмқҳ м ҖмһҘ кө¬мЎ°лЎң л¶„лҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” кІғ. вҮ’н…Ңмқҙлё”мқҙ м»Өм§җм—җ л”°лқј л°ңмғқн•ҳлҠ” м„ұлҠҘ м Җн•ҳлҘј н•ҙкІ°н•ҳкё° мң„н•Ё вӯҗн…Ңмқҙлё”мқҙ нҢҢнӢ°м…ҳлҗҳл©ҙ indexлҸ„ л¶„лҰ¬лҗңлӢӨ. terminalм—җм„ң partition мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙліҙкё° startDayвҖҰ

4NF MVD(multivalued dependency) : relation Rм—җм„ң мҶҚм„ұ Aк°Җ мҶҚм„ұ Bмқҳ к°’ н•ҳлӮҳлҘј кІ°м •н•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҙ м•„лӢҲлқј м—¬лҹ¬ к°ңмқҳ к°’, мҰү к°’мқҳ м§‘н•©мқ„ кІ°м •н•  л•Ң, мҶҚм„ұ AмҷҖ BлҘј AвҶ’>BлЎң н‘ңнҳ„н•ҳкі  MVDвҖҰ

React н”„лЎңм қнҠё мғқм„ұн•ҳкё° м ңмқј лЁјм Җ recoilмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкІҢ лҗ  н”„лЎңм қнҠёлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҙмӨҚлӢҲлӢӨ.  Recoil кё°ліё - л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ м№ҙмҡҙн„° мҳҲм ң recoil м„Өм№ҳн•ҳкё°
н„°лҜёл„җм—җм„ң лӢӨмқҢ лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мһ…л Ҙн•ҳм—¬ recoil нҢЁнӮӨм§ҖлҘј м„Өм№ҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. <RecoilRootвҖҰ

nodes.excerpt: мҡ©м–ҙ м„ӨлӘ… Functional dependency(=FD, н•ЁмҲҳ мў…мҶҚ) мҲҳн•ҷм Ғ к°ңл…җмңјлЎңм„ң н•ЁмҲҳмқҳ м •мқҳлҠ” лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷлӢӨ. мң„ к°ңл…җкіј л§Ҳм°¬к°Җм§ҖлЎң, relationвҖҰ

markdownRemark.excerpt: лӘ©м°Ё Adding Lights and Shadows request AnimationFrame Adding statistics and dat.GUI Adding Light and Shadows WebGLм—җм„ңлҠ” shaderм—җм„ң лӘЁл‘җ м§Ғм ‘ кө¬нҳ„н–Ҳм–ҙм•ј н–ҲлӢӨ. вҮ’Three.jsвҖҰ
markdownRemark.html:
лӘ©м°Ё

  • Adding Lights and Shadows
  • request AnimationFrame
  • Adding statistics and dat.GUI

Adding Light and Shadows

WebGLм—җм„ңлҠ” shaderм—җм„ң лӘЁл‘җ м§Ғм ‘ кө¬нҳ„н–Ҳм–ҙм•ј н–ҲлӢӨ.

вҮ’Three.jsм—җм„ңлҠ” кІҢмһ„м—”м§„мІҳлҹј кё°ліём Ғмқё кё°лҠҘмқ„ м ңкіөн•ҙмЈјкі  мһҲлӢӨ.

  1. Scene мғқм„ұ

    scene = new THREE.Scene()

  2. Renderer мғқм„ұ

    renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer()
renderer.setClearColor(new THREE.Color(0xeeeeee, 1.0))
renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight)
renderer.shadowMapEnabled = true //к·ёлҰјмһҗ м„Өм •

  3. Light мғқм„ұ

  • Ambient LightлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳкі  sceneм—җ м¶”к°Җн•ңлӢӨ.

    • AmbientLightлҠ” к·ёлҰјмһҗлҘј к·ёлҰҙ мҲҳ м—ҶлӢӨ.(мӮ¬л°©м—җм„ң л№ӣмқҙ л“Өм–ҙмҳӨлҠ” кІҪмҡ°мқҙлҜҖлЎң)

  • Spot LightлҘј л°ұмғүкҙ‘мңјлЎң мғқм„ұн•ҳкі , мң„м№ҳлҘј м„Өм •н•ҳкі (targetмқ„ м„Өм •н•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ кё°ліём ҒмңјлЎң (0,0,0)мқ„ н–Ҙн•ңлӢӨ. к·ёлҰјмһҗлҘј м„Өм •н•ҳкі  sceneм—җ м¶”к°Җн•ңлӢӨ.

    • к·ёлҰјмһҗлҘј мғқм„ұн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” lightлҠ” лҢҖн‘ңм ҒмңјлЎң spot lightмҷҖ directional lightк°Җ мһҲлӢӨ.
    // add subtle ambient lighting
var ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0x0f0f0f)
scene.add(ambientLight)

// add spotlight for the shadows
var spotLight = new THREE.SpotLight(0xffffff)
spotLight.position.set(50, 50, 50)
spotLight.castShadow = true //к·ёлҰјмһҗ м„Өм •
scene.add(spotLight)

  1. Object мғқм„ұ

    л°”лӢҘмқҙ лҗ  plane к°қмІҙ мғқм„ұ л°Ҹ к·ёлҰјмһҗ/мң„м№ҳ м„Өм • нӣ„ sceneм—җ м¶”к°Җ

    // create the ground plane
var planeGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(50, 50, 50, 50)
var planeMaterial = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0xffffff })
var plane = new THREE.Mesh(planeGeometry, planeMaterial)
plane.receiveShadow = true //к·ёлҰјмһҗ м„Өм •

// rotate and position the plane
plane.rotation.x = -0.5 * Math.PI
plane.position.x = 0
plane.position.y = -7
plane.position.z = 0
scene.add(plane)

    лҢҖмғҒмқё CG н…ҚмҠӨнҠё мҳӨлёҢм қнҠёлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳкі  к·ёлҰјмһҗ м„Өм •мқ„ н•ҙмӨҖ л’Ө sceneм—җ м¶”к°Җн•ңлӢӨ.

    var textGeometry = new THREE.TextGeometry("CG", {
  font: "helvetiker",
  size: 10,
  height: 2,
})
textGeometry.center()
var meshMaterial = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
  specular: 0xffffff,
  color: 0x0eff0e,
  shininess: 30,
  metal: true,
})
var text = new THREE.Mesh(textGeometry, meshMaterial)
text.castShadow = true
scene.add(text)

    вӯҗмҡ”м•Ҫн•ҳл©ҙ, к·ёлҰјмһҗлҘј л ҢлҚ”л§Ғн•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ңлҠ” кҙ‘мӣҗ, к·ёлҰјмһҗк°Җ мғқкёё нҸүл©ҙ, к·ёлҰјмһҗлҘј л§Ңл“Ө лҢҖмғҒ мҙқ м„ёк°Җм§Җ мҡ”мҶҢм—җ к·ёлҰјмһҗ м„Өм •мқ„ н•ҙмЈјм–ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

    • renderer.shadowMapEnabled=true;
    • plane.receiveShadow=true;
    • cube.castShadow=true;

  2. Rendererмқҳ Outputмқ„ html мҡ”мҶҢм—җ м¶”к°Җ

    мқҙлЎңмҚЁ л ҢлҚ”л§Ғн•ң кІ°кіјл¬јмқ„ мӣ№ нҺҳмқҙм§Җ мғҒм—җ лқ„мҡё мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

    // add the output of the renderer to the html element
document.getElementById("WebGL-output").appendChild(renderer.domElement)

  3. Camera мғқм„ұ

    м№ҙл©”лқј к°қмІҙлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳкі  мң„м№ҳ л°Ҹ л°©н–Ҙмқ„ м„Өм •н•ҙмӨҖлӢӨ.

    camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(
  45,
  window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight,
  0.1,
  1000
)
camera.position.x = 10
camera.position.y = 20
camera.position.z = 60
camera.lookAt(scene.position)

Expanding the scene with animations

  • requestAnimationFrame()мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ render() н•ЁмҲҳм—җ м •мқҳн•ң мҪ”л“ңлҘј л§Ө н”„л Ҳмһ„л§ҲлӢӨ мӢӨн–үн•ҳлҸ„лЎқ н•ңлӢӨ.
function init(){
	...
	var radian = 45
	render()
  function render() {
	  radian += controls.rotationSpeed
    spotLight.position.x = 50 * Math.sqrt(2) * Math.cos(radian)
    spotLight.position.z = 50 * Math.sqrt(2) * Math.sin(radian)

    requestAnimationFrame(render)
    renderer.render(scene, camera)
  }
}
window.onload=init

Adding statistics

кҙ‘мӣҗмқҳ нҡҢм „ мҶҚлҸ„лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ м ңм–ҙн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ н•ҳлҠ” UI м°Ҫмқ„ м¶”к°Җн•ҙліҙмһҗ.

  • <script> нғңк·ёлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ html нҢҢмқјм—җ stats.jsмҷҖ dat.gui.js мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёлҘј нҸ¬н•ЁмӢңнӮЁлӢӨ.

    <head>
  <title>Assignment02</title>
  <script type="text/javascript" src="../libs/three.js"></script>

  <script type="text/javascript" src="../libs/stats.js"></script>
  <script type="text/javascript" src="../libs/dat.gui.js"></script>
  ...
</head>

  • init() н•ЁмҲҳ лӮҙм—җ нҶөкі„ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј мҙҲкё°нҷ”н•ҳлҠ” initStats() н•ЁмҲҳлҘј м¶”к°Җн•ңлӢӨ.

    function init(){
	var stats = initStats()
	...
	function initStats() {
		//init
		var stats = new Stats()
		stats.setMode(0) // 0: fps, 1: ms

		// Align top-left
		stats.domElement.style.position = 'absolute'
		stats.domElement.style.left = '0px'
		stats.domElement.style.top = '0px'

		document.getElementById('Stats-output').appendChild(stats.domElement)
		return stats
	}

  • controls н•ЁмҲҳм—җ м ңм–ҙн•ҳкі мһҗ н•ҳлҠ” к°’мқҳ мҙҲкё° к°’мқ„ м…ӢнҢ…

    var controls = new (function () {
  this.rotationSpeed = 0.1
  this.message = "0"
})()

  • gui н•ЁмҲҳм—җ guiлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳкі мһҗ н•ҳлҠ” ліҖмҲҳ к°’мқ„ м¶”к°Җ

    var gui = new dat.GUI()
gui.add(controls, "rotationSpeed", 0, 0.5)
gui.add(controls, "message", "test").listen()
    var radian = 45
render(1)
function render(time) {
  time *= 0.001
  var timelap = time - parseFloat(controls.message)
  if (timelap > 0.03) {
    controls.message = time.toFixed(3)
  }
  radian += controls.rotationSpeed
  spotLight.position.x = 50 * Math.sqrt(2) * Math.cos(radian)
  spotLight.position.z = 50 * Math.sqrt(2) * Math.sin(radian)

  requestAnimationFrame(render)
  renderer.render(scene, camera)
}

м „мІҙ мҪ”л“ң

<!DOCTYPE html>

<html>
  <head>
    <title>Assignment02</title>
    <script type="text/javascript" src="../libs/three.js"></script>

    <script type="text/javascript" src="../libs/stats.js"></script>
    <script type="text/javascript" src="../libs/dat.gui.js"></script>
    <script
      type="text/javascript"
      src="../assets/fonts/helvetiker_regular.typeface.js"
    ></script>
    <script
      type="text/javascript"
      src="../assets/fonts/helvetiker_bold.typeface.js"
    ></script>

    <style>
      body {
        /* set margin to 0 and overflow to hidden, to go fullscreen */
        margin: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div id="Stats-output"></div>
    <!-- Div which will hold the Output -->
    <div id="WebGL-output"></div>

    <!-- Javascript code that runs our Three.js examples -->
    <script type="text/javascript">
      var camera
      var scene
      var renderer
      // once everything is loaded, we run our Three.js stuff.
      function init() {
        var stats = initStats()

        // create a scene, that will hold all our elements such as objects, cameras and lights.
        scene = new THREE.Scene()

        // create a camera, which defines where we're looking at.
        camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(
          45,
          window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight,
          0.1,
          1000
        )

        // create a render and set the size
        renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer()
        renderer.setClearColor(new THREE.Color(0xeeeeee, 1.0))
        renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight)
        renderer.shadowMapEnabled = true

        // add subtle ambient lighting
        var ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0x0f0f0f)
        scene.add(ambientLight)

        // add spotlight for the shadows
        var spotLight = new THREE.SpotLight(0xffffff)
        spotLight.position.set(50, 50, 50)
        spotLight.castShadow = true
        scene.add(spotLight)

        // create the ground plane
        var planeGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(50, 50, 50, 50)
        var planeMaterial = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0xffffff })
        var plane = new THREE.Mesh(planeGeometry, planeMaterial)
        plane.receiveShadow = true

        // rotate and position the plane
        plane.rotation.x = -0.5 * Math.PI
        plane.position.x = 0
        plane.position.y = -7
        plane.position.z = 0
        scene.add(plane)

        // add the output of the renderer to the html element
        document.getElementById('WebGL-output').appendChild(renderer.domElement)

        // call the render function
        var step = 0

        var textGeometry = new THREE.TextGeometry('CG', {
          font: 'helvetiker',
          size: 10,
          height: 2,
        })
        textGeometry.center()
        var meshMaterial = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
          specular: 0xffffff,
          color: 0x0eff0e,
          shininess: 30,
          metal: true,
        })
        var text = new THREE.Mesh(textGeometry, meshMaterial)
        text.castShadow = true
        scene.add(text)

        // position and point the camera to the center of the scene
        //м”¬ лӮҙм—җм„ң м№ҙл©”лқјмқҳ мң„м№ҳ
        camera.position.x = 10
        camera.position.y = 20
        camera.position.z = 60
        camera.lookAt(scene.position)
        var controls = new (function () {
          this.rotationSpeed = 0.1
          this.message = '0'
        })()
        var gui = new dat.GUI()
        gui.add(controls, 'rotationSpeed', 0, 0.5)
        gui.add(controls, 'message', 'test').listen()
        var radian = 45
        render(1)
        function render(time) {
          time *= 0.001
          var timelap = time - parseFloat(controls.message)
          if (timelap > 0.03) {
            controls.message = time.toFixed(3)
          }

          radian += controls.rotationSpeed
          spotLight.position.x = 50 * Math.sqrt(2) * Math.cos(radian)
          spotLight.position.z = 50 * Math.sqrt(2) * Math.sin(radian)

          requestAnimationFrame(render)
          renderer.render(scene, camera)
        }

        function initStats() {
          //init

          var stats = new Stats()
          stats.setMode(0) // 0: fps, 1: ms

          // Align top-left
          stats.domElement.style.position = 'absolute'
          stats.domElement.style.left = '0px'
          stats.domElement.style.top = '0px'

          document.getElementById('Stats-output').appendChild(stats.domElement)

          return stats
        }
      }
      function onResize() {
        camera.aspect = window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight
        camera.updateProjectionMatrix()
        renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight)
      }
      window.onload = init
      // listen to the resize events
      window.addEventListener('resize', onResize, false)
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
